nodes.title: Get Funds List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/funds. Returns array of funds for business with balances joined. Requires Authorization header and bizId membership. Returns 200 with [{id, name, fundType (cash/bank/exchange/e-wallet), provider, stationId, stationName, responsiblePerson, balance, currencyId, createdAt}]. Funds ordered by fundType and name. Returns 401 if unauthorized. Returns 403 if not member of business.

nodes.title: Get Fund By Id
nodes.description: GET /funds/:id. Returns single fund with balance. Returns 200 with {id, name, fundType, balance, ...}. Returns 404 if not found. Used for lookups when creating vouchers.

nodes.title: Post Fund Create
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/funds with body {name, fundType, provider, stationId, responsiblePerson, currencyId, initialBalance}. Validates fundType in allowed list (cash, bank, exchange, e-wallet). Inserts into funds table and creates initial balance record if initialBalance provided. Returns 201 with created fund {id, name, fundType, ...}. Returns 400 if validation fails or fundType invalid. Requires funds create permission.

nodes.title: Put Fund Update
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id with body fields to update (name, provider, responsiblePerson, isActive). Validates fundId belongs to business. Cannot change fundType after creation. Updates funds table. Returns 200 with updated fund. Returns 404 if fund not found. Returns 403 if fund not in business.

nodes.title: Delete Fund
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id. Validates ownership then deletes from funds table (cascade deletes balances). Returns 200 with {success: true}. Returns 404 if not found. Returns 403 if not authorized. Returns 400 if fund has transactions (cannot delete). Requires funds delete permission.
